name: 禁慾系美男懸念
description: 太子一心向佛、拒絕女色，且對接近他的宮女施以殘酷懲罰。這個設定製造了強烈的'攻略不可能對象'懸念，觀眾期待看到這道防線如何被突破。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated as a Doomed Palace Maid...Modern Knowledge Turned Her Into the Prince’s Treasure
examples.excerpt: When the crown prince was little, he was frail and sickly. A virtuous monk said that if the crown prince turned to Buddhism, he would receive the Buddha's protection. Now the crown prince is disillusioned and is wholeheartedly devoted to Buddhism. ... Guards, take her out of here. 50 strokes of the cane and banish her from the Eastern Palace.
